revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-260

The bending of light rays as a consequence of their refraction at atmospheric layers of different densities and therefore of different refractive index.

{{IALAFooter}}
